note_data.title: The internet and its uses
keyPoints: The **internet** is a worldwide collection of interconnected networks that communicate using TCP/IP protocols
The **World Wide Web** is a service that uses the internet to access websites and web pages through hyperlinks
A **web browser** is software that requests, receives, and displays web pages from web servers
**HTTP** (HyperText Transfer Protocol) is used to transfer web pages, while **HTTPS** adds encryption for security
**Digital currency** uses cryptographic techniques and exists only in electronic form, with no physical coins or notes
**Cyber security** involves protecting computer systems and networks from digital attacks, theft, and damage
**URLs** (Uniform Resource Locators) specify the location of web resources using format: protocol://domain/path
**ISPs** (Internet Service Providers) provide internet access to homes and businesses through various connection methods

definitions.definition: A worldwide collection of interconnected networks that communicate using standard protocols
A service that uses the internet to access websites consisting of linked web pages
Software application used to access and display web pages from web servers
Electronic money that uses cryptographic techniques for secure transactions and exists only in digital form
The practice of protecting computer systems, networks and data from digital attacks and unauthorized access

howToAnswer.instruction: Give one fact in one sentence. No explanation needed.
Give the point + reason using 'because' or 'this is because'
Give detailed characteristics or features of the concept
State similarities and differences between two things

modelAnswer.question: Explain the difference between the internet and the World Wide Web. [4 marks]
modelAnswer.answer: The internet is a worldwide collection of interconnected networks that communicate using TCP/IP protocols. The World Wide Web is a service that runs on the internet. The internet provides the infrastructure for data transmission between computers. The World Wide Web uses this infrastructure to access websites and web pages through hyperlinks and web browsers.
markBreakdown: Mark 2: WWW is a service on the internet
Mark 4: WWW uses browsers/hyperlinks to access websites

commonMistakes: Never say 'internet and WWW are the same thing' — they are different: internet is infrastructure, WWW is a service
Students often confuse web browser with web server — browser displays pages, server stores and sends them
Don't say digital currency is 'fake money' — say it exists only in electronic form with cryptographic security
Never describe cyber security as just 'antivirus' — it includes protecting networks, data, and systems from all digital threats
Students mix up HTTP and HTML — HTTP transfers web pages, HTML is the markup language used to create them
examinerTips: Internet vs WWW distinction appears frequently in Paper 1 and Paper 2
Always mention 'cryptographic techniques' when defining digital currency
For cyber security questions, give specific examples like firewalls, encryption, secure passwords
URL questions often ask for protocol identification — remember http:// or https://
Browser questions may ask about features like bookmarks, history, cookies
note_data.keyDiagramDescription: Network diagram showing computers connected through routers and ISPs to illustrate internet infrastructure, with web servers and clients accessing WWW services
